Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Video.summary: Megan Fudge and Karin Kochis take on Ryann Foster and Lee Whitwell in this Women's Split Pro Doubles semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: In this charity showdown, Pro pickleball players and celebs will represent their alma maters and battle it out for the Picklebowl 2023 trophy. Hosted by Heisman Trophy winner and former NFL player turned pickleball enthusiast, Danny Wuerffel.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1

English Nationals 2023 - Women's Doubles Open - Group A - 1

Video.summary: Check out these US Open Pickleball Championship 2023 highlights!
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Highlight Reel

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues its high-energy opening day at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a star-studded clash between Delhi Dilwale and the Chennai Super Champs. Watch as international stars like Delhi’s Max "Purple Jesus" Manthao and Chennai’s Hwang Nam Lee—a former Wimbledon junior doubles champion—bring world-class precision to the court. With celebrity co-owner Samantha cheering from the sidelines and strategic masterclasses from coach Wesley Gabrielsson, this tie features a gauntlet of intense Women’s Singles, Men's Singles, and high-speed Doubles matches. Experience every "Ernie" shot, tactical "pickle play," and the longest video challenge in league history as these two powerhouse teams battle for early-season dominance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: March 21, 2023 - the Peoria Pythons and Scottsdale Scorchers play a fierce game of pickleball - live at The Orchard!
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 21, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 21, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 21, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 21, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Match

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: NCPA Quarterfinals: Utah Valley vs Virgina in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA Quarterfinals: Utah Valley vs. UVA

Image.alt: NCPA Quarterfinals: Utah Valley vs. UVA
NCPA Quarterfinals: Utah Valley vs. UVA
NCPA Quarterfinals: Utah Valley vs. UVA

Video.summary: Experience the pinnacle of collegiate pickleball as Virginia Tech and Liberty University battle for the NCPA 2025 Virginia Beach Regional title. This high-stakes championship matchup features a prize pool of $2,500 and a chance for regional dominance.The action kicks off with an elite men’s doubles match featuring Liberty’s Ben Rice and Derek Cray against Virginia Tech’s undefeated Cody Miller and Caelan Funk. The broadcast also captures intense singles play and critical mixed doubles rallies as both teams fight through high-tension dink battles and "Dreambreaker" level strategy. Watch for standout defensive plays, including ATP (Around the Post) attempts and high-speed hand battles on the Championship Court at Pickleball Virginia Beach.
Video.title: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Image.alt: Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University
Team Championship Match - Virginia Tech vs. Liberty University

Video.summary: Megan Fudge along with husband Ryler Deheart faced off against Simone Jardim & Kyle Yates in a Semifinal match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Watch Jennifer Dawson battle it out for gold against Leslie Bernard in this Women's Senior Pro Singles match at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2023.

Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Houston Hammers in a mixed team match.
Video.title: NPL - Stingers vs Hammers Team (Mixed)

Image.alt: NPL - Stingers vs Hammers Team (Mixed)
NPL - Stingers vs Hammers Team (Mixed)
NPL - Stingers vs Hammers Team (Mixed)

Video.summary: The 2022 Picklebowl offers an unforgettable mixed doubles match featuring some of the biggest names in sports. US Olympian Casey Patterson and pickleball pro Chuck Taylor join forces to take on pickleball standout Megan Fudge and former tennis world No. 5 Kevin Anderson. Set against the scenic backdrop of Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event blends elite pickleball play with charity and college pride. Expect explosive rallies, pinpoint accuracy, and powerful serves in this high-energy exhibition that showcases the crossover appeal of pickleball.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson
Picklebowl 2022 – Mixed Doubles – Patterson & Taylor vs Fudge & Anderson

Video.summary: In the finals of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, the Fort Myers Flamingos and the GMV Chomp go head-to-head. The commentators, including Angel, highlight the youth and fire of Fort Myers player Jade and the consistent dominance of the number one women's team, the GMV Chomp. The match is a best-of-three, rally-scoring format with games to 21. The episode showcases impressive plays from Stevie and Kelsey, and praises Heather Nobler's "nasty" two-handed backhand. The commentators also discuss the challenge for the team coming out of pool number two, which has less rest time before the finals.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: This episode provides courtside commentary on Game 3 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, featuring the Fort Myers Flamingos and the Old Town Bangers. The commentators highlight the aggressive play of newcomer Jada Bui and the defensive prowess of Ellie Schele. They also discuss the importance of mental toughness and team chemistry in a high-pressure environment. The episode concludes with a preview of the upcoming men's match.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
